title: World Bank Group - International Development, Poverty and Sustainability
body: Carbon Pricing Now Covers Nearly One-Third of Global Emissions Carbon Pricing Now Covers Nearly One-Third of Global Emissions The latest report finds that carbon pricing is expanding worldwide, covering over 29% of global emissions and generating more than $107 billion in public revenue in 2025. https://www.worldbank.org/en/publication/state-and-trends-of-carbon-pricing Read the Report Top eager https://delivery-p136806-e1377844.adobeaemcloud.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:52d2acec-389f-4673-a40d-94ed025efbb1/as/Partnerships%20homepage.jpg What the Human Capital Index Plus Means for People and Growth feature story How Boosting Manufacturing in Türkiye Is Creating Stable, Formal Jobs https://www.worldbank.org/en/news/feature/2026/05/13/how-boosting-manufacturing-in-turkiye-is-creating-stable-formal-jobs https://delivery-p136806-e1377844.adobeaemcloud.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:52d2acec-389f-4673-a40d-94ed025efbb1/as/Partnerships%20homepage.jpg Faced with Global Shocks, Protect Investments that Drive Growth and Jobs blog Faced with Global Shocks, Protect Investments that Drive Growth and Jobs https://blogs.worldbank.org/en/voices/faced-with-global-shocks-protect-investments-that-drive-growth-and-jobs https://delivery-p136806-e1377844.adobeaemcloud.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:52d2acec-389f-4673-a40d-94ed025efbb1/as/Partnerships%20homepage.jpg Driving Job Creation in Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan, and Pakistan immersive story Driving Job Creation in Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan, and Pakistan https://www.worldbank.org/en/news/immersive-story/2026/05/13/driving-job-creation-middle-east-north-africa-afghanistan-pakistan https://delivery-p136806-e1377844.adobeaemcloud.com/adobe/assets/urn:aaid:aem:52d2acec-389f-4673-a40d-94ed025efbb1/as/Partnerships%20homepage.jpg sec-spacing section-none sec-spacing-bottom section-padding-between style bg-primary-blue sec-inside-container false OUR PRIORITIES lp-heading-bottom-xlarge false image Jobs Why jobs?
